entry.title: New: RES25-061 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
APPROVING THE WRITE-OFF OF UNCOLLECTIBLE ACCOUNTS OWED TO THE CITY.

The Department of Budget arid Fiscal Services, Division of Treasury has determined that the City has uncollectible accounts in excess of $1,000 as of June 30, 2024, totaling $53,060.02, that must be referred to the City Council for write-off approval.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
